def test_kl_divergences():
        """Test that KL divergences meet the target requirements."""
        P = np.load("/app/dist.npy")
    
        # Normalize to ensure valid probability distribution
        P = P / P.sum()
    
        # Compute KL divergences
        kf = kl_forward(P)
        kb = kl_backward(P)
